title: Draft content sprints need evidence and risk notes before live-channel approval
lesson: For AG Digitalz social content workflows, every draft post package should include a source/evidence note and a risk note so unproven revenue, client outcome, live workflow, or case-study claims are caught before owner review or any future live-channel approval.
whyThisMatters: It preserves trust and avoids unsupported-proof drift before social content can move toward approval, scheduling, or posting.
whenToUse: Use during draft content sprint creation, target PR review, and pre-live social content approval package preparation.
whenNotToUse: Do not treat this candidate as accepted memory or permission to post, schedule, connect accounts, use analytics APIs, or activate automations.
notes: Candidate-only lesson. It must not be loaded as accepted truth unless owner-approved in a future promotion workflow.
